# Nitya Narasimhan — Personal Knowledge Platform

> A data-first personal website. Structured JSON data in the repo's `data/`
> folder is the single source of truth; this website is the human-facing view.
> The same data is meant to be consumed by agents (chat bots, assistants).

## About

- Name: Nitya Narasimhan, PhD
- Role: Software Engineer, Developer Advocate & Researcher
- Site: https://nitya.github.io

## Data sources (source of truth)

The canonical structured data lives in the GitHub repository `nitya/nitya.github.io`
under `data/`, one JSON file per source:

- Profile: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nitya/nitya.github.io/main/data/profile.json
- Patents: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nitya/nitya.github.io/main/data/patents.json
- Publications: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nitya/nitya.github.io/main/data/publications.json
- Talks: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nitya/nitya.github.io/main/data/talks.json
- Projects: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nitya/nitya.github.io/main/data/projects.json

## Pages

- Home: https://nitya.github.io/
- About: https://nitya.github.io/about
- Content (all items): https://nitya.github.io/content

## Notes for agents

- Prefer the JSON data files above over scraping the rendered HTML.
- Each item has a stable `id`. Schemas mirror external canonical sources
  (USPTO/Google Patents, Google Scholar/ACM/IEEE, Sessionize/SpeakerDeck, GitHub).
- To propose data changes, see `AGENTS.md` and the skills in `.github/skills/`.
